scenario.summary: Board prep — consolidated risk briefing across all processes
scenario.situation: Board meeting in 10 days. The CFO needs a consolidated view of enterprise risk and performance. Multiple signals are converging: raw material cost spike compressing margins, two customer accounts deteriorating, an unusual FX exposure in APAC, and the anomaly detection system flagged a new vendor and a manual journal entry. The CFO needs to walk into the board meeting with a clear picture of where the risks are, how they're connected, and what's being done about them.
dataInputs: Q4 forecast v2 and scenario analysis
Current financial position and close results
agentSteps: Step 1 — Anomaly Detection provides the current risk landscape: 2 critical flags (duplicate invoice pattern at GlobalSteel, unapproved new vendor in Houston), 1 high flag (manual JE with no docs), plus cross-process risk signals

Step 2 — Financial Forecasting provides the forward-looking exposure: Q4 forecast v2 shows gross margin compressing from 35.2% to 31.9%. Models the impact if raw material costs stay elevated through Q1 — operating income drops 18%

Step 3 — Financial Reporting provides the consolidated risk dashboard: pulls together the anomaly flags, forecast scenarios, and current financial position. Traffic-light indicators across 5 risk categories
Synthesis: Unified risk briefing — top risk is margin compression (330bps hit, $47M impact if sustained), with 4 action items for procurement, sales, treasury, and internal audit
scenario.expectedOutput: Board-ready risk briefing with consolidated risk dashboard, top 5 risks ranked by financial impact, recommended actions with owners, and positive signals. Auto-generated — CFO reviews and edits, doesn't build from scratch.

stats.label: Expect AI agents with orchestration to manage global business services by 2027
Already use AI for fixed asset and risk management
More leaders use advanced analytics for enterprise risk management

topRisk.impact: 330bps hit to gross margin, $47M to operating income if sustained through Q1

riskCategories.detail: AP anomalies — duplicate invoice pattern, unapproved vendor
2 customers deteriorating — Continental Mfg AG, Pacific Dynamics

actionItems: Procurement to renegotiate steel contracts or activate alternate suppliers
Sales to engage Titan and Apex on Q1 order commitments to de-risk revenue
Treasury to hedge the JPY exposure
Internal audit to investigate the Houston vendor onboarding gap
positiveSignals: Close process running 2 days ahead of schedule
Collections on track for 4 of top 6 customers
